messages.author: them
messages.text: Quick favor: can you act normal if my landlord sees you leaving my apartment?

messages.author: them
messages.text: Good. Also if he asks, you're my cousin

messages.author: me
messages.text: Why would your landlord be monitoring cousin traffic

messages.author: them
messages.text: Because my lease says no pets and I'm borrowing my sister's dog for one night

messages.author: me
messages.text: You sent this to your landlord

messages.author: them
messages.text: I know. He just replied, "Then your cousin needs a leash. The dog is in the hallway eating my fern."

messages.author: me
messages.text: Honestly that's on you for assigning me fern behavior

messages.author: them
messages.text: Please come over. Apparently my cousin has also pooped by 4B.
